summary: Iteration 5: Comprehensive testing of Backup & Notification Settings APIs and UI. All 14 backend tests pass (100%). Fixed 1 minor backend issue (backup list was returning data field). Frontend UI verified working correctly for both Super Admin backup tab and Clinic Admin notification settings.

fixed_this_iteration.issue: Backup list was returning 'data' field (large backup content) which should be excluded
fixed_this_iteration.fix: Added 'data: 0' to MongoDB projection to exclude data field from list response

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/companies/{id}/backups - Create backup returns 200 with id, status, size
Backend: GET /api/companies/{id}/backups - List backups returns 200 without data field
Backend: POST /api/companies/{id}/backups/{id}/restore - Restore backup returns 200
Backend: DELETE /api/companies/{id}/backups/{id} - Delete backup returns 200
Backend: DELETE non-existent backup returns 404
Backend: Clinic admin cannot restore backups (403 - super admin only)
Backend: GET /api/companies/{id}/notification-settings - Returns settings with masked auth token
Backend: POST /api/companies/{id}/notification-settings - Save settings works
Backend: Settings persistence verified
Backend: Update reminder settings works
Backend: Test notification fails gracefully without Twilio keys (400)
Backend: Super admin can access any company's notification settings
Backend: User denied access to other company's settings (403)
Backend: Custom message templates save correctly
Frontend: Super Admin login works
Frontend: Navigate to Super Admin Dashboard shows 6 clinics, 12 doctors
Frontend: Clinics list page shows all clinics with management buttons
Frontend: Clinic detail page shows all 6 tabs
Frontend: Backup tab shows stats (available, successful, last backup date)
Frontend: Create Backup button works - shows success toast
Frontend: Backup history displays with restore/delete buttons
Frontend: Clinic Admin Dashboard - Settings tab shows Twilio config
Frontend: Auto reminder toggle and settings visible
Frontend: Message templates editable
critical_code_review_comments: Twilio SMS/WhatsApp sending is MOCKED - actual sending disabled until valid Twilio keys are configured
Background reminder task runs every hour (process_auto_reminders)
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (line 2794: added 'data: 0' to exclude data field from backup list)
seed_data_creation: Multiple backups created during testing, test notification settings saved
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backup and Notification Settings features fully tested. Super Admin can: create/list/restore/delete backups for any clinic. Clinic Admin (with company_id) can: configure Twilio SMS/WhatsApp, set auto reminders, customize message templates. Twilio actual sending is MOCKED until real keys provided. All APIs tested via pytest and UI verified via Playwright.

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS/WhatsApp: Sending actual messages disabled - connection test verifies Twilio account but doesn't send real messages

backup.create_backup: Working - captures patients, appointments, invoices, visits, bookings, staff, notification_settings
backup.list_backups: Working - excludes data field for performance
backup.restore_backup: Working - replaces current data with backup data (super admin only)

notification_settings.twilio_sms_config: Working - Account SID, Auth Token (masked), Phone Number
notification_settings.message_templates: Working - confirmation, reminder, cancellation, completion templates with variables
